title: TinyFire
description: Very Short Fire on ground, Very Short Fire Overlay when on fire, Smoke Particles from Primed TnT and Fire removed-by Floating_Pc
body: The TinyFire Resource pack is a pack that makes **fire on ground about 8-16 pixels small** wich is basically the **same size as a carpet in game** and also makes the **Fire Overlay when your burning super small** and particles like **smoke particles that come from Primed TnT and Something Burning has been removed** to add a little **more and better Performance** since many people like to play with **Orbital Cannons** lol
